config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can easily be used to justify abuse of power and silence minority voices. In my view, a just society protects individual rights first, then balances them with the common good when there is a real and clear public need. From my perspective, community matters a lot, but it should not erase personal dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu memang tidak absolut dalam semua situasi, tetapi justru hak-hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan perlindungan minoritas harus menjadi batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar begitu saja. Kepentingan umum penting, tetapi harus dibuktikan secara nyata dan dibatasi seketat mungkin, bukan dijadikan alasan umum untuk mengorbankan orang per orang. Kalau masyarakat diberi prioritas tanpa pagar yang kuat, yang paling sering dirugikan biasanya bukan “ego individu,” melainkan kelompok yang paling lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should have automatic priority over the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of idea can be very easily abused by authorities, majorities, or even local social pressure. We have seen how appeals to harmony, order, or “the common good” can silence dissent and make it harder for minorities to defend their rights. Public interest matters, but it should be a limit on individual freedom only when there is a clear, necessary, and proportionate reason, not as a blanket excuse. For me, a healthy society is one that protects individual dignity first and then asks people to contribute to the common good responsibly.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya prioritas mutlak untuk kepentingan masyarakat terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi kekuasaan yang semena-mena. Dari pengalaman nilai-nilai di Amerika Serikat, hak individu seperti kebebasan berbicara, due process, dan perlindungan minoritas justru harus menjadi pagar utama, bukan sesuatu yang dikalahkan begitu saja demi “kepentingan umum”. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dibuktikan secara konkret, dibatasi ketat, dan tidak boleh dipakai sebagai alasan umum untuk mengorbankan orang yang paling rentan. Kalau hak individu dikesampingkan terlalu mudah, yang paling sering kena dampaknya bukan orang yang kuat, melainkan mereka yang paling tidak punya suara.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support giving society automatic priority over the individual, because in Indonesia that logic is often used to pressure people into silence and obedience. I understand the concern about public order and the common good, but those goals are not legitimate if they override basic rights too easily, especially for minorities and dissenters. In my view, society becomes stronger when individual dignity is protected first and any restriction is clearly necessary, proportional, and accountable. If “the interests of society” is left too vague, it can become a convenient excuse for abuse.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh diberi prioritas otomatis di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman nilai-nilai di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat betapa mudahnya dalih “kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, terutama ketika hak bicara, proses hukum, dan perlindungan minoritas dianggap bisa dikorbankan. Kepentingan sosial memang nyata, tetapi harus dibatasi secara konkret, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan alasan umum untuk menekan orang yang paling rentan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu terlebih dahulu, lalu menyeimbangkannya dengan kebutuhan bersama saat ada alasan yang jelas dan mendesak.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
